# ImageTruth AI

> Detect AI-generated and manipulated images with a consensus of 5 independent AI models. Free to start.

ImageTruth AI is a forensic image-verification tool for journalists, investigators, legal professionals, HR teams, insurance companies, and researchers. Upload a photo and 5 independent AI models analyze it for AI generation, deepfake signatures, and manipulation signals, then return a consensus verdict with per-model breakdown and a downloadable PDF report.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Upload an image and run multi-model AI detection.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Transparent walkthrough of the analysis pipeline.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach support and the team.

## Blog

- [10 Signs a Photo May Be Photoshopped](/blog/photoshopped-signs): Practical guide for spotting edited images.
